title: Herschelle and his TikTok tannie go viral
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A simple walk down...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A simple walk down the street turned into a fitness journey for Hettie Langenhoven (60), now known as the "TikTok tannie" from Heather Park. And behind her transformation? Local fitness coach Herschelle Jantjies.Herschelle, a longtime friend of Hettie’s daughter, Nelmarie, has been like family.


> In January, during a visit, he casually asked, "So tannie Hettie, when are we going for a walk?"


At first, she laughed it off - after battling Covid-19, even standing was a struggle. But Herschelle’s persistence won, and soon she was walking at her own pace.Nelmarie started recording their weekly walks, and when Herschelle shared a video on TikTok, it went viral. Suddenly, people were cheering her on, and a petrol attendant even recognised her as "the TikTok tannie."What began as a hesitant stroll has become routine. Hettie has gained energy, mobility, and confidence. "I walked here by myself this morning," she proudly says.


> Now, every tannie wants a Herschelle.


Read the full story about Hettie's adventure with Herschelle in today's George Herald.

WATCH: The TikTok video that made Hettie and Herschelle famous:

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Hettie Langenhoven and Herschelle Jantjies in his gym in Heather Park. They've walked an inspiring road together. Photo: Kristy Kolberg

Click here for more videos and to follow Herschelle on TikTok

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
